description: Greek accent, breathing, and vowel marks observed in the corpus.

marks.name: Grave accent
marks.description: Accent mark used in Greek orthography; often replaces acute in certain positions.

marks.name: Acute accent
marks.description: Accent mark indicating the stressed syllable in printed Greek.

marks.name: Diaeresis
marks.description: Shows that a vowel is pronounced separately rather than as part of a diphthong.

marks.name: Smooth breathing
marks.description: Marks absence of an initial h sound on a vowel or rho in Greek orthography.

marks.name: Rough breathing
marks.description: Marks an initial h sound on a vowel or rho in Greek orthography.

marks.name: Circumflex accent
marks.description: Accent mark used with long vowels or diphthongs in Greek orthography.

marks.name: Iota subscript
marks.description: Small iota written beneath a vowel, reflecting an older diphthong.

marks.name: Koronis
marks.description: Curved mark used in Greek elision or crasis notation.
